title: Super Dreamer 4 Piece Complete Duvet Cover With Fitted Sheet & Pillowcases, Polycotton Fabric Geometric Bedding Set, Double, Green/Charcoal
features: EYE-CATCHING GEOMETRIC PATTERN: A striking geometric pattern is printed onto this stylish double bed complete set to bring freshness and life into your bedroom. The ideal accompaniment for the spring and summer months, as well as a way to brighten the room in colder seasons, the half circle design in vibrant green, is a great refreshment for your bedding collection.

EXPERTLY MANUFACTURED FOR SUPREME DURABILITY: Designed to be enhancing your sleep experience for many nights to come, this long-lasting complete bedding set double is the ideal way to revitalise your home accessories in one simple step.
REVERSIBLE FOUR-PIECE SET: Containing a double duvet cover, a fitted sheet and 2 matching pillowcases, the reverse of this striking set feature a rich colour to brighten your bedroom.
MACHINE WASHABLE FOR SIMPLE UPKEEP: This sumptuous easy-care complete bed set can be washed in a domestic washing machine and is tumble dryer compatible.

As we Evolve, our homes should too. To make your home as comfortable as attractive, please visit the Amazon Official GC GAVENO CAVAILIA store. For any issues with the product, please feel free to contact us. We will reply within 24 hours and figure out a good solution.
